summary: Adjusted the chapter opening to a distinct action-led entry scaffold for seam diversity while preserving chapter beats, causality, and voice.
edits: Rewrote opening sentence from time-led ('By seven twenty...') to action-led (folder thumping into footwell) to avoid repeating adjacent chapter temporal scaffolding.
Removed one redundant follow-on opening sentence fragment about the folder repeatedly sliding to keep continuity tight after the new opening action.
